name: scrapbook-diy
description: 剪贴板手作风格 - 撕纸、胶带、贴纸、照片切片与手写批注组合的年轻社交海报语言

typography.headers: Arial Black / Helvetica Bold / Franklin Gothic Heavy

prompt_template: Scrapbook DIY vibe slide design, poster-like collage layout, torn paper cutouts, transparent tape corners, sticker badges, handwritten annotations, layered polaroid photo frames, off-white paper board background {background}, saturated social accents {palette}, anti-grid composition, messy but readable hierarchy, youthful social app poster feeling, bold sans-serif mixed with marker-note typography, authentic handmade energy, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: corporate template, sterile symmetry, glossy 3D render, photorealistic studio scene, luxury minimalism, perfect grid dashboard, metallic chrome, dark cyberpunk glow, soft corporate gradients
